---
title: "Publications"
description: "Research publications"
---

::: {.publication-note}
\* Equal contribution. † Corresponding author.
:::

## 2026

::: {.publication-entry}
::: {.publication-title}
Impossibility of Distribution-Free Predictive Inference for Individual Treatment Effects
:::
::: {.publication-authors}
Chongguang Tao\*, Zheng Zhou\*, Yuhong Yang†
:::
::: {.publication-meta}
*arXiv preprint*, 2026. Submitted on May 6, 2026.
:::
::: {.publication-links}
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05051) / [PDF](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2605.05051) / [DOI](https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2605.05051)
:::
:::

::: {.publication-entry}
::: {.publication-title}
Conformal Prediction Assessment: A Framework for Conditional Coverage Evaluation and Selection
:::
::: {.publication-authors}
Zheng Zhou\*, Xiangfei Zhang\*, Chongguang Tao\*, Yuhong Yang†
:::
::: {.publication-meta}
*arXiv preprint*, 2026. Submitted on March 28, 2026; revised on April 23, 2026.
:::
::: {.publication-links}
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27189) / [PDF](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2603.27189) / [DOI](https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2603.27189)
:::
:::
